zh.lifeSummary: 當Eustachie de Châtillon於1210年出生在法國時，她的父親Gaucher III de CHATILLON44歲，母親Elisabeth de SAINT-POL30歲。她去世於1242年在她的家鄉享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eustachie de Châtillon于1210年出生在法国时，她的父亲Gaucher III de CHATILLON44岁，母亲Elisabeth de SAINT-POL30岁。她去世于1242年在她的家乡享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eustachie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Eustachie de Châtillon was born in 1210, in France, her father, Gaucher III de CHATILLON, was 44 and her mother, Elisabeth de SAINT-POL, was 30. She died in 1242, in her hometown, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eustachie de Châtillon est née en 1210, à France, son père, Gaucher III de CHATILLON, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de SAINT-POL, avait 30 ans. Elle est décédée en 1242, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eustachie de Châtillon 1210 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gaucher III de CHATILLON 44 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth de SAINT-POL 30. Sie starb 1242 im Alter von 32 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eustachie de Châtillon è nata il nel 1210 nel Francia, sua padre, Gaucher III de CHATILLON, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth de SAINT-POL, aveva 30 anni. Morì nel 1242, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eustachie de Châtillonが1210年にフランスで生まれた時，父Gaucher III de CHATILLONは44歳，母Elisabeth de SAINT-POLは30歳であった。彼女は1242年に故郷で32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eustachie de Châtillon(이)가 1210년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gaucher III de CHATILLON(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth de SAINT-POL(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1242년 그녀의 고향에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eustachie de Châtillon nasceu em 1210, em França, seu pai, Gaucher III de CHATILLON, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de SAINT-POL, tinha 30 anos. Ela faleceu em 1242, em sua cidade natal, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eustachie de Châtillon родилась в 1210 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Gaucher III de CHATILLON было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de SAINT-POL, 30. Она умерла в 1242 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eustachie de Châtillon nació en 1210, en Francia, su papá, Gaucher III de CHATILLON, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de SAINT-POL, tenía 30 años. Murió en 1242, en su pueblo, a la edad de 32 años.
